title: Surgeries | Jeremy Wright
headings: h3: Sir Jeremy Wright MP Kenilworth and Southam
text_excerpt: Surgeries | Jeremy Wright Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Jeremy News In Parliament HS2 Campaign Responses Contact Surgeries Tweet I have regular surgery appointments available for constituents. I want to stress that, whatever the problem is, my team and I will try to help in any way that we can. Where we cannot or unable, we will be transparent and honest. If you would like to a request an appointment, please email me at [email protected] or contact my office on 01926 853650. Strict Parliamentary protocol states that I can only deal with constituents of Kenilworth and Southam, so please include your full name, address (including postcode) and contact details in the email. Please also include details of the issue you would like to discuss. This will all be kept fully confidential.
